name: Jingwei Textile Machinery Company Limited
summary: Jingwei Textile Machinery Company Limited produces and sells textile machinery and related parts in China. The company offers cotton spinning, weaving, warp knitting, twisting, printing and dyeing, and chemical fiber machinery. It also engages in the financial trust and equity investment businesses. Jingwei Textile Machinery Company Limited was founded in 1995 and is based in Beijing, China.
